title: Sweep remaining 3 bare-catch sites with structured logging
description:
Add `LogWarning` before silent fallback at 3 remaining catch→silent sites not covered by TSK-0101:
1. `Agent.Memory/RestMemoryGateway.cs` ~line 82 — HTTP 404/parse error silently swallowed
2. `Agent.World.Minecraft/WebSocketBridge.cs` ~line 96 — CloseAsync best-effort catch
3. `Agent.World.Minecraft/WebSocketBridge.cs` ~line 480 — malformed inventory parse silently swallowed

Each should log warning with exception type and context before falling through. Add NUnit tests for the error paths where feasible.

Evidence: Sprint 46 audit-validation council report identified these as remaining gaps.

**Note:** Auto-generated key TSK-0102 conflicts with existing Sprint 46 Wave A task (ChatServices cross-repo request). Correct key is **TSK-0111**.
